tldr: C22 complete (fix-login-request-format, Aria) — login contract bug from C21 fixed and verified at the network level. Awaiting Eran's manual browser click-through of the 4 deferred DOM checks to formally close Phase 1, then a replan for Phase 2 (Nova/LLM wiring). No open handoffs. No blockers.
next_commit_name: phase-1-closeout (pending Eran's manual verification, then /replan for Phase 2)
notes: C22 committed 2026-06-07 (47bca18). Aria changed loginApi (frontend/src/api/auth.ts) from form-urlencoded `username`/`password` to JSON `{email, password}`, matching the backend LoginRequest schema (C10, unchanged). tsc --noEmit clean (verified independently by Aria and Claude). Claude additionally verified the fix at the network/contract level: the exact JSON request the new loginApi sends now returns 200 + valid token for both admin and manager-role accounts; the old form-urlencoded shape still 422s, confirming the root cause and the fix. The 3 remaining DOM/redirect checks (login form render, /dashboard redirect+placeholder, /admin role-redirect) require browser-driving capability not available to Claude (no Playwright/chrome-devtools MCP in this environment — same gap Adam hit in C21); Eran agreed to do a quick manual click-through himself rather than block the commit, since C22 did not touch Login.tsx/ProtectedRoute/dashboard (only the API wire format). Once Eran confirms those 3 (+ the still-open C21 'not verified' /login render check), Phase 1 can be formally declared complete and a /replan should define the Phase 2 commit sequence (Nova activates Phase 2 per DECISIONS.md — LLMService wiring). Adam's throwaway manager user (manager.smoke@manifesto.local/manager123) remains in the dev DB — still undecided whether to keep as a fixture or remove.
